programme.title: Asian Food Network
programme.desc: Asian Food Network is the region’s leading food-focused channel that celebrates the unique Asian culinary experience with the added touch of global flavor. AFN entertains viewers with a range of local and international content from reality, lifestyle to travelogue program formats. It believes in celebrating the rich history and story behind Asia’s most beloved cuisines and continues to grow its library of originally produced Asian content, breaking boundaries with new and exciting programs. Available in more than 10 countries in Asia Pacific, the channel’s online engagement via website and social media platforms surpass two million likes on Facebook and continues to increase daily. Asian Food Channel is part of Scripps Networks Interactive, one of the world’s leading producers of lifestyle content. More information is available on www.asianfoodchannel.com or Facebook page www.facebook.com/asianfoodchannel.

More information is available on www.asianfoodchannel.com or Facebook page www.facebook.com/asianfoodchannel.

programme.title: Asian Food Network
programme.desc: Asian Food Network is the region’s leading food-focused channel that celebrates the unique Asian culinary experience with the added touch of global flavor. AFN entertains viewers with a range of local and international content from reality, lifestyle to travelogue program formats. It believes in celebrating the rich history and story behind Asia’s most beloved cuisines and continues to grow its library of originally produced Asian content, breaking boundaries with new and exciting programs. programme.title: Otlum
programme.desc: It centers on a group of friends who dares each other to stay in a haunted house.

programme.title: My Illegal Wife
programme.desc: A man wakes up with amnesia, and is tricked by the woman he first sees into believing that he's married to her.

programme.title: Block Z
programme.desc: A pre-med student and her friends encounter the death of a patient that exhibited symptoms of rabies. They are soon faced with an even bigger problem as their patient comes back from the dead and infects the people on campus, causing a lockdown and trapping the students inside.

programme.title: A Moment In Time
programme.desc: A struggling artist travels to Amsterdam to try and win back the heart of the woman he loves.

programme.title: You're My Boss
programme.desc: A lowly assistant and his domineering boss are forced to switch places in order to win over an important client.

programme.title: Throwback Today
programme.desc: Primo is gifted with a good eye for production design and ventures into the working world with a great desire to succeed. However, life doesn't turn out as he has expected and while he is trying to make ends meet, he experiences a technical glitch in his old computer and gets a chance to rewrite his life.

programme.title: Barumbadings
programme.desc: Three gay gangsters mourn the death of their gay guardian, but end up celebrating his bright and colorful life.

programme.title: This Guy's Inlove with You Mare
programme.desc: Heartbroken that his longtime crush is now attached to a woman, a gay man sets out to ruin that relationship by pretending to be straight and courting the affections of his love's girlfriend.

programme.title: Roadtrip
programme.desc: Five friends go on a roadtrip to visit the wake of a friend.

programme.title: Men Are From QC, Women Are From Alabang
programme.desc: A QC boy and an Alabang girl have been together since college, weathering the distance and other issues that have come their way. But now that they’ve started to work, the “real world” seems to be pushing them even more apart. This is a relationship story told through two different perspectives of the same events, as the couple grows distant (literally and figuratively) through time.

programme.title: The Breakup Playlist
programme.desc: A story about an aspiring professional singer and a rock singer who collaborates in a song. As they work on their song, they start to develop feelings for each other.

programme.title: Hello, Universe!
programme.desc: Ariel, a middle-aged man full of regrets, gets another chance to rewrite his past when he meets a magical figure who gives him the life he has always dreamt of. But at what cost?
